title: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The controlled file is SV-2048 at Revision E.
SV-2048 was issued 12 Jul 2026 at 18:40 MST.
The controlled cutover start is 14 Jul 2026 at 22:00 MST.
The controlled lots are PX-771 and TZ-219, coordinated by Avery Kim.

regions.label: Overlapped authority table and detached headings

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization
Overlapped authority table and detached headings

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Priority, Record, Controls, Does not control.
The source row order is recoverable as: Page 5 executed authorization -> Page 4 dependency / exception sheet -> Page 3 approved reconciliation -> Page 2 cutover workplan.
For Page 5 executed authorization, Controls is Selective GO/HOLD, exclusions, signed corrections.
For Page 5 executed authorization, Does not control is Rates or exception closure.
For Page 4 dependency / exception sheet, Controls is Directed gates, exception state, accepted evidence.

value: Directed gates, exception state, accepted evidence

leaves.expectation: For Page 4 dependency / exception sheet, Does not control is Commercial ceiling.
For Page 3 approved reconciliation, Controls is Current rates, ceiling, and invoice route.

value: Current rates, ceiling, and invoice route

leaves.expectation: For Page 3 approved reconciliation, Does not control is Operational release.
For Page 2 cutover workplan, Controls is Sequence, windows, handoffs, and task gates.

value: Sequence, windows, handoffs, and task gates

leaves.expectation: For Page 2 cutover workplan, Does not control is Final authorization.
A lower-priority record may add detail but cannot reverse the highest applicable controlled state.

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: ID, Group, Site / asset, Activity, Owner, Window, Gate / evidence, State.
The source row order is recoverable as: T-01 -> T-02 -> T-04 -> T-03 -> T-05 -> T-06.
For T-01, Activity is Reserve the controlled bay and verify that Kestrel access list AC-44 remains active..

value: Reserve the controlled bay and verify that Kestrel access list AC-44 remains active.

leaves.expectation: For T-01, Gate / evidence is FC-119 acknowledged; AC-44 posted.
For T-02, Activity is Shift live telemetry from KG-2 to BG-5 while maintaining parallel capture..

value: Shift live telemetry from KG-2 to BG-5 while maintaining parallel capture.

leaves.expectation: For T-02, Gate / evidence is TV-19 delta <=0.3 C for 30 continuous min.

value: TV-19 delta <=0.3 C for 30 continuous min

leaves.expectation: For T-02, State is CONDITIONAL.
For T-04, Activity is Transfer 48 eligible pallets after T-02 and condition C-1 release the lot..

value: Transfer 48 eligible pallets after T-02 and condition C-1 release the lot.

leaves.expectation: For T-04, Gate / evidence is SC-77: 48 moved; 0 orphan pallets.
For T-04, State is BLOCKED: T-02.
For T-03, Gate / evidence is IC-882 signed by Northstar and carrier.

value: IC-882 signed by Northstar and carrier

leaves.expectation: For T-05, Activity is Transfer 26 eligible pallets; keep six QA-61 cases segregated..

value: Transfer 26 eligible pallets; keep six QA-61 cases segregated.

leaves.expectation: For T-05, Gate / evidence is QR-203 or segregated-custody receipt.
For T-05, State is READY: EXCLUDE 6.
For T-06, Activity is Reconcile both lots, then close Kestrel credentials only after the waiver..

value: Reconcile both lots, then close Kestrel credentials only after the waiver.

leaves.expectation: For T-06, Gate / evidence is REC-2048 zero unresolved + EX-07 signed.
For T-06, State is HOLD.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Trigger, Notify, Channel, Required content.
The source row order is recoverable as: T-02 passes -> T-04 completes -> RB-12 invoked.
For T-02 passes, Required content is P-14 final delta and validation end time.

value: P-14 final delta and validation end time

leaves.expectation: For T-04 completes, Required content is PX-771 moved count and orphan count.

value: PX-771 moved count and orphan count

leaves.expectation: For RB-12 invoked, Required content is Last completed task and custody location.

value: Last completed task and custody location

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: Invoking RB-12 stops the active transfer.
RB-12 preserves custody at the last confirmed location.
RB-12 requires the last completed task to be reported on BR-2048.

sectionPath: Northstar Cold Chain Supplier Cutover Authorization

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Line, Submitted / superseded, Approved / current, Approval note.
The source row order is recoverable as: Boreal implementation -> Kestrel overlap -> Sensor validation -> Contingency -> Request / ceiling.
For Boreal implementation, Submitted / superseded is Q-884 rev B / $19,200.
For Boreal implementation, Approved / current is Q-884 rev C / $18,600.
For Kestrel overlap, Submitted / superseded is 3 nights / $6,480.
For Kestrel overlap, Approved / current is Maximum 2 nights / $4,320.
For Kestrel overlap, Approval note is Only while EX-07 remains open.
For Sensor validation, Approved / current is TV-19 / $2,150.
For Contingency, Submitted / superseded is $4,500.
For Contingency, Approved / current is $3,000.
For Contingency, Approval note is Only if EX-07 extends overlap.
For Request / ceiling, Submitted / superseded is Submitted total / $32,330.
For Request / ceiling, Approved / current is NTE ceiling / $28,070.
For Request / ceiling, Approval note is Reapproval above ceiling.
Q-884 rev B / $19,200 is crossed out.
3 nights / $6,480 is crossed out.
$4,500 contingency is crossed out.
Submitted total / $32,330 is crossed out.

leaves.expectation: The region preserves the source field schema in order: Exception, Affected obligation, Current finding, Owner, Due, Accepted closure evidence, State.
The source row order is recoverable as: E-05 -> EX-07 -> E-08 -> E-09 -> E-11 -> E-14.
For E-05, Accepted closure evidence is Signed TV-19 trace with 30-minute comparison.
For E-05, State is CLOSED.
For EX-07, Affected obligation is T-06 credential closure.
For EX-07, Accepted closure evidence is Countersigned waiver WA-771.
For EX-07, State is OPEN.

leaves.expectation: For E-14, State is MONITOR.
